parameters.jsonBody: {"alert_name": "={{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.alert_name}}", "service_name": "={{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.service_name}}", "severity": "={{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.severity}}"}
{"model": "mistral", "prompt": "Alert: {{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.alert_name}} Service: {{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.service_name}} Analyze and provide root cause", "stream": false}
{"status": "processing", "ticket_data": {{$node[\"⚡ Autonomous Decision Logic\"].json.ticket_data}}, "agents_executed": {{$node[\"⚡ Autonomous Decision Logic\"].json.agents_executed}}}

parameters.responseBody: {"status": "orchestration_complete", "trace_id": "={{$node[\"Parse Alert Data\"].json.trace_id}}", "message": "All agents executed successfully", "ticket_created": true}
